title: kleronomos #2818
definition:
1) one who receives by lot, an heir
    1a) an heir
    1b) in Messianic usage, one who receives his allotted
        possession by right of sonship
 2) one who has acquired or obtained the portion allotted to him
nasbUsage:

    1a) an heir
    1b) in Messianic usage, one who receives his allotted
